issues.description: Action should be 'PlayFromHand' or 'PlaySelf' (to play from deck onto board), not 'SearchDeck'. SearchDeck typically means tutoring to hand. The card text says 'Play up to 1 [Smiley] from your deck' which means directly playing it onto the board.
'destination' field is not standard for Play actions. Use 'amount' constraint instead (up to 1). The play action implicitly puts the card on board.
Missing shuffle deck action. Card text includes 'then shuffle your deck' but DSL has no corresponding action to shuffle.
